base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of werewolf_bear_variants — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Werewolf / werebear / Metal Beast — 3 palette variants (blue/yellow/red). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Werewolf / werebear / Metal Beast — 3 palette variants (blue/yellow/red); claw attack enemy
